headline: Humana Foundation Increases Investment to Help End the Veteran Suicide Crisis
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., March 03, 2026--The Humana Foundation, the philanthropic arm of Humana Inc. for the past 45 years, today announced an expanded commitment to Face the Fight®, a national, cross‑sector initiative dedicated to dramatically reducing veteran suicide. As a founding partner, the Foundation will invest $5 million to scale evidence informed solutions, strengthen data collection efforts, and expand support for community-based organizations serving veterans at high risk of suicide.
